objective: Refactor trigonometric/transcendental shaders into responsibility subfolders while preserving shader asset declarations and catalog references. Complete topology: elementary_trig owns circular trig formulas and Mandelbrot/Julia variants; hyperbolic owns sinh/cosh/tanh formulas and variants; exponential_iteration owns exp/superexp/tetration iteration formulas; special_functions owns zeta/eta/Jacobi/Mittag-Leffler/Weierstrass formulas. Shader files remain pure GLSL assets exposed through pubspec and escape_time_catalog asset strings; no subfolder depends on UI/app orchestration.
